transcript: I'm Gonna' to myself at night Because I can't forget I said goodbye, get both of them through my mind Behind a cigarette And the mess is coming through my eyes Says leave me alone Oh, wow The mess is coming from my bones Said I found a new home Yeah I found a new home Oh, damn.
